title: The Prohibition of Electronic Cigarettes (Production, Manufacture, Import, Export, Transport, Sale, Distribution, Storage and Advertisement) Act, 2019
full_text: The Prohibition of Electronic Cigarettes (Production, Manufacture, Import, Export, Transport, Sale, Distribution, Storage and Advertisement) Act, 2019 इलेक्‍ट्रानिक सिगरेट (उत्पानदन, विनिर्माण,आयात, निर्यात, परिवहन, विक्रय,वितरण, भंडारण और विज्ञापन)प्रतिषेध अधिनियम, 2019 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201942 Act Number: 42 Enactment Date: 2019-12-05 Act Year: 2019 Short Title: The Prohibition of Electronic Cigarettes (Production, Manufacture, Import, Export, Transport, Sale, Distribution, Storage and Advertisement) Act, 2019 Hindi Title: इलेक्‍ट्रानिक सिगरेट (उत्पानदन, विनिर्माण,आयात, निर्यात, परिवहन, विक्रय,वितरण, भंडारण और विज्ञापन)प्रतिषेध अधिनियम, 2019 Long Title: An Act to prohibit the production, manufacture, import, export, transport, sale, distribution, storage and advertisement of electronic cigarettes in the interest of public health to protect the people from harm and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Department: Department of Health and Family Welfare Enforcement Date: 18-09-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Prohibition of Electronic Cigarettes (Production, Manufacture, Import, Export, Transport, Sale, Distribution, Storage and Advertisement) Act, 2019 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Declaration as to expediency of control by Union. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Prohibition on production, manufacturing, import, export, transport, sale, distribution, advertisement of electronic cigarettes. Section 5. Prohibition on storage of electronic cigarettes. Section 6. Power to enter, search and seize without warrant. Section 7. Punishment for contravention of section 4. Section 8. Punishment for contravention of section 5. Section 9. Jurisdiction and trial of offences. Section 10. Power to dispose of stock seized. Section 11. Offences by companies. Section 12. . Cognizance of offences. Section 13. Offences to be cognizable. Section 14. Act to have overriding effect. Section 15. Application of other laws not barred. Section 16. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 17. Power to remove difficulties. Section 18. Repeal and savings.
